tasks.label: ✅ Verify
tasks.detail: Validate flake syntax and evaluate modules

tasks.label: 🧪 Eval
tasks.command: echo '=== Flake Check ===' && nix flake check --show-trace && echo && echo '=== Eval System ===' && nix eval .#nixosConfigurations.2600AD.config.system.build.toplevel.drvPath --show-trace && echo && echo '=== Eval Home Manager ===' && nix eval .#nixosConfigurations.2600AD.config.home-manager.users.bittermang.home.packages --show-trace && echo '✓ All evaluations passed'

tasks.label: 🔄 Update
tasks.detail: Update all flake inputs to latest

tasks.label: 🔑 Secrets
tasks.detail: Show status of sops secrets files
tasks.command: echo '════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  HALLway Secrets Status' && echo '════════════════════════════════════' && for host in 2600AD HALLpass.space HelloMoto; do f="hosts/$host/secrets.yaml"; if [ -f "$f" ]; then if head -1 "$f" 2>/dev/null | grep -q '^sops:'; then echo "  ✓  $f"; else echo "  ⚠  $f (not encrypted)"; fi; else echo "  ✗  $f (missing)"; fi; done && echo '' && echo '════════════════════════════════════' && echo '  Edit: sops hosts/<host>/secrets.yaml' && echo '  Docs: docs/secrets.md'

tasks.label: 🖴 Disk
tasks.detail: Show disk usage and Nix store size
tasks.command: echo '=== Disk Usage ===' && df -h / /home /nix 2>/dev/null && echo '' && echo '=== Nix Store ===' && du -sh /nix/store && echo '' && echo '=== Memory ===' && free -h

tasks.label: 🗑️ GC
tasks.detail: Garbage collect user generations (run sudo nix-collect-garbage -d in terminal for full cleanup)
tasks.command: nix-collect-garbage -d && echo '' && echo '=== Store Size ===' && du -sh /nix/store && echo '' && echo 'Note: Run "sudo nix-collect-garbage -d" in terminal for system generations'

tasks.label: 🧹 Clean
tasks.command: rm -rf result result-* && echo '✓ Cleaned result symlinks'
